200# return «

User rating: item not rated yet

Fighter type: Archer

Introduced in: Special offer

 

Write a review Send to Discord

Rate this item


description 2/6

On attack, has a 25% chance to deal an additional 25000 pure damage, ignoring armor and shields, and blinding the enemy for 4 sec. A blinded enemy has a 50% chance to miss.

description 4/6

On attack, has a 25% chance to deal an additional 45000 pure damage, ignoring armor and shields, and blinding the enemy for 4 sec. A blinded enemy has a 65% chance to miss. Once in a while, fires a powerful shot at the most distant target. This shot deals 175000 damage and stuns for 4 sec.

description 6/6

On attack, has a 30% chance to deal an additional 75000 pure damage, ignoring armor and shields, and blinding the enemy for 6 sec. A blinded enemy has a 80% chance to miss. Once in a while, fires a powerful shot at the most distant target. This shot deals 300000 damage and stuns for 4,5 sec. At the start of the battle, throws two grenades at random enemies (prefers to attacks mages), dealing 100000 damage and silencing them for 9 sec. Once in a while, throws smaller grenades, dealing 45000 damage and causing silence for 4,5 sec.


Substance of Chaos

description 2/6

Ranger’s attacks deal 25% more damage to blinded targets.

description 4/6

Ranger’s attacks deal 25% more damage to blinded targets. The damage of Ranger’s powerful shot ignores the target’s armor and shields.

description 6/6

Ranger’s attacks deal 25% more damage to blinded targets. The damage of Ranger’s powerful shot ignores the target’s armor and shields. The Ranger’s grenade deal damage and silence enemies in a small radius around the main target of the ability.


Substance of Greatness

description 2/6

When Ranger blinds an enemy, they reduce the damage of that enemy by 15% for 5 sec. Up to 4 effects.

description 4/6

When Ranger blinds an enemy, they reduce the damage of that enemy by 15% for 5 sec. Up to 4 effects. Ranger has a 25% chance to block damage.

description 6/6

When Ranger blinds an enemy, they reduce the damage of that enemy by 15% for 5 sec. Up to 4 effects. Ranger has a 25% chance to block damage. Granades deal damage to the target and all enemies in a small radius. Also, all affected enemies have their damage reduced by 20% for 8 sec. Once in a while, Ranger cannot be targeted for 3 sec.


Substance of Harmony

description 2/6

Ranger’s damage is increased by 10% for each blind enemy. Up to 4 effects. This ability works for the duration of the battle.

description 4/6

Ranger’s damage is increased by 10% for each blind enemy. Up to 4 effects. This ability works for the duration of the battle. The powerful shot disarms the enemy for 4 sec. The disarmed enemy is unable to use their weapon abilities during that period. Ranger also steals 25% damage from this unit for 4 sec.

description 6/6

Ranger’s damage is increased by 10% for each blind enemy. Up to 4 effects. This ability works for the duration of the battle. The powerful shot disarms the enemy for 4 sec. The disarmed enemy is unable to use their weapon abilities during that period. Ranger also steals 25% damage from this unit for 4 sec. Depending on the target’s class, Ranger’s grenades have an additional effect : - Tanks – Reduce physical armor by 5000 for 5 sec. - Mage – Reduce spell power by 20000 for 5 sec. - Archers – Reduce damage by 10000 for 5 sec.
